Soil/Rock Description: Concrete with cobbles and gravels of moderately decomposed granite and occasionally some steel fragment. (FILL).
Sub-rounded cobbles and gravels of moderately decomposed granite and weathered fine brown, silty SAND (ALLUVIUM).

Moderately strong to strong, brownish pink mottled black and white, moderately to slightly decomposed medium to coarse grained GRANITE. Fine grained to medium spaced and occasionally widely spaced, very narrow to extremely narrow, rough planar, stained, moderately weathered and kaolin stained joints, dipping 70°-80°, 80°-90° and occasionally vertical joints.
No recovery (from 23.40m-23.80m: No recovery within the granite description)
Weathered fine brown, pink mottled black and white, highly to moderately decomposed medium to coarse grained GRANITE.
